ab: ryax soni ga nyux samiy rasun Sinsiy mwah lmosay mita qqsinuw qnalang, ru mbkuw myan kyopan blihun maziy Kipu.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: mzyup samiy qqsinuw qnalang lga,kmal Sinsiy mha:「te gling ga qbhniq,te suruw ga mqu,ktay kya nanak. mzyup samiy qqsinuw qnalang lga, kmal Sinsiy mha, “te gling ga qbhniq, te suruw ga mqu, ktay kya nanak.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: mngungu saku mqu, nanu ini saku kita mqu hiya.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: piyux balay qbhniq ktan maku, cyux mlaka babaw qhuniq, ru ktan maku nguyaq cyux m’abi bling qhuniq.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: zik qqsinuw qnalang ga maki Zo, rme, kli ka, iyat maku kntan na qqsinuw, nyux maku ktan soni ga mqas ku balay.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: piyux nagal muw Syasing, spkita muw yaba yaya.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: babaw nya ga pgluw saku yaba yaya mwah.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
